nasb.text: ‘Cursed is he who lies with his father’s wife, because he has uncovered his father’s skirt.’ And all the people shall say, ‘Amen.’

esv.text: “‘Cursed be anyone who lies with his father’s wife, because he has uncovered his father’s nakedness.’ And all the people shall say, ‘Amen.’

cnv.text: “‘和父親的妻子同寢的，必受咒詛，因為他揭開了他父親的衣襟。’眾民都要說：‘阿們。’

ccb.text: ‘凡与父亲的妻妾乱伦，使父亲蒙羞的必受咒诅！’ 全体民众要回答说，‘阿们！’
